---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve CRUX Terminal
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or recordings to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **macOS version**: (e.g., 14.2 Sonoma)
- **CRUX version**: (e.g., 0.1.0)
- **Node.js version**: (e.g., 20.11.0)
- **Shell**: (e.g., zsh, bash, fish)
- **Display setup**: (e.g., single monitor, dual monitor, external display)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here — error messages from the DevTools console, relevant configuration, etc.
